plugin_desc: Enterasys（现 Extreme Networks 旗下）企业级交换机专用 SNMP 采集模板（ENTERASYS-MIB，企业号 5624）。除标准 IF-MIB 64 位 HC 接口流量外，额外采集 Enterasys 私有 OID 的设备健康指标：CPU 使用率（etsysResourceCpuLoad，直接以百分比上报）、主内存（已用 + 空闲，KB，用量按 已用/（已用+空闲）推导）、机箱温度（℃）与电源状态（etsysChassisPowerSupplyState，经 telegraf processors.enum 归一为 1=正常/2=异常）。适用品牌型号——Enterasys SecureStack / S-Series / Matrix 企业网管交换机（企业号 5624，legacy 设备现并入 Extreme）。
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the Enterasys switch (ENTERASYS-MIB etsysResourceCpuLoad, reported directly as a percentage).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_used
metrics.description: Used memory of the Enterasys switch in bytes (ENTERASYS-MIB etsysResourceStorageUsed, KB*1024).

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Free memory of the Enterasys switch in bytes (ENTERASYS-MIB etsysResourceStorageAvailable, KB*1024).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Enterasys switch, derived as used/(used+free).

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Chassis temperature of the Enterasys switch in degrees Celsius (ENTERASYS-MIB chassis temperature sensor).

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: Power-supply state of the Enterasys switch (ENTERASYS-MIB etsysChassisPowerSupplyState), normalised to 1=normal / 2=abnormal.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
